results.title: Bingley Harriers ace smashes 200m record ahead of European Champs in Italy
results.description: After a record-breaking performance at the Welsh Championship, Bingley Harriers sprinter Ethan Heggarty is to compete in Italy at the European U18 Championship.

results.title: Soccer-Bellingham double guides England to World Cup semis in extra-time win over Norway
results.description: MIAMI, July ⁠11 (Reuters) - Jude Bellingham scored twice ⁠as England beat Norway 2-1 ‌in an extra time thriller in their World Cup quarter-final in Miami ​Stadium on Saturday.

results.title: England edge Norway after extra-time thriller to reach 2026 World Cup semi-finals
results.description: England booked their place in the semi-finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after producing a spirited comeback to defeat Norway 2-1 after extra time in a gripping quarter-final clash at Miami Stadium. The Three Lions were forced to dig deep after falling behind in the first half but responded with determination, scoring [...]

results.title: Kane, England Eliminate Haaland, Norway, Final Match Stats, Highlights & Updated World Cup Bracket
results.description: Harry Kane, Jude Bellingham and England punched their ticket to the 2026 FIFA World Cup semifinals with a hard-fought 2-1 extra-time victory over Erling Haaland and Norway on Saturday.

results.title: Bellingham double guides England to World Cup semis in extra-time win over Norway
results.description: MIAMI, July 11 - Jude Bellingham scored twice as England beat Norway 2-1 in an extra time thriller in their World Cup quarter-final in Miami Stadium on Saturday.

results.title: "Erling needs to see this ": BTS' Jimin's hilarious Erling Haaland impression sparks fan frenzy ahead of FIFA World Cup Halftime Show
results.description: BTS' Jimin sent fans into a frenzy after a concert clip showed him seemingly recreating Erling Haaland's signature walk. The playful moment quickly went viral on X, with ARMY flooding social media with jokes and calls for the two stars to meet. The buzz comes just days before BTS joins Justin Bieber, Madonna and Shakira for the historic FIFA World Cup 2026 final halftime show in New York.

results.title: UFC 329: Damian Pinas makes callout after another first-round knokckout
results.description: Dangerous surging middleweight prospect Damian Pinas know who he wants next after his UFC 329 knockout win.

results.title: Norway 1-2 England: Jude Bellingham makes history as Three Lions reach World Cup semi-finals
results.description: England's Jude Bellingham stars once again at the World Cup as the Three Lions beat Norway to reach the semi-finals.

results.title: Erling Haaland’s record of consecutive goals in competitive matches ends against England
results.description: The Norwegian striker had scored in every one of his side’s competitive fixtures since the UEFA Nations League B fixture against Austria in October 2024.

results.title: Viral Video Shows Jude Bellingham's Playful Ass Grab On Erling Haaland During England Vs Norway Clash
results.description: A viral video from England's clash against Norway shows Jude Bellingham playfully grabbing Erling Haaland's backside while the pair marked each other during a set piece. Haaland brushed off the gesture with a smile before both shared a laugh. The light-hearted moment delighted fans, highlighting the close friendship between the former Borussia Dortmund teammates.

results.title: England make World Cup semifinals, eliminating Norway 2-1
results.description: The scores were locked at 1-all at full-time, so the match went to a 30 minute extra time period.

results.title: 2026 World Cup: England come from behind to beat Norway and reach semi-final
results.description: Thomas Tuchel's side rode their luck in a quarter-final played in fierce heat and humidity - but Bellingham was once again the talisman to send England into the last four, where they will play either Argentina or Switzerland.

results.title: Jude Bellingham carries England past Norway for World Cup semifinal berth
